VictoryRoad1F.before:
I wonder if you
are good enough
for me!
VictoryRoad1F.after:
I never wanted to
lose to anybody!

VictoryRoad1F.before:
I can see you're
good! Let me see
exactly how good!
VictoryRoad1F.after:
I concede, you're
better than me!

VictoryRoad2F.after:
If you get stuck,
try moving some
boulders around!

VictoryRoad2F.before:
Ah, so you wish
to challenge the
ELITE FOUR?

VictoryRoad2F.after:
You earned the
right to be on
VICTORY ROAD!

VictoryRoad2F.before:
If you can get
through here, you
can go meet the
ELITE FOUR!
VictoryRoad2F.after:
I can beat you
when it comes to
knowledge about
POKEMON!

Many trainers give
up the challenge
here.

VictoryRoad3F.before:
I heard rumors of
a child prodigy!
VictoryRoad3F.after:
You beat GIOVANNI
of TEAM ROCKET?

VictoryRoad3F.before:
I'll show you just
how good you are!
VictoryRoad3F.after:
You showed me just
how good I was!

VictoryRoad3F.before:
Only the chosen
can pass here!
VictoryRoad3F.after:
All trainers here
are headed to the
POKEMON LEAGUE!
Be careful!

VictoryRoad3F.before:
Trainers live to
seek stronger
opponents!
VictoryRoad3F.after:
By fighting tough
battles, you get
stronger!

PokemonMansion1F.before:
Who are you? There
shouldn't be
anyone here.
PokemonMansion1F.after:
A key? I don't
know what you're
talking about.

PokemonMansion2F.before:
I can't get out!
This old place is
one big puzzle!
PokemonMansion2F.after:
Switches open and
close alternating
sets of doors!

PokemonMansion3F.after:
I wonder where
my partner went.

So, you're stuck?
Try jumping off
over there!

PokemonMansionB1F.after:
You can find stuff
lying around.

PokemonMansionB1F.before:
This place is
ideal for a lab.
PokemonMansionB1F.after:
I like it here!
It's conducive to
my studies!
